'''lasosho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:chador|chador]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-s-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chador|chador]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| lasosho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:læsesheth|læsesheth]] || [[word:læseshej|læseshej]] || [[word:læseshesh|læseshesh]] || [[word:læseshe|læseshe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lasososhoth|lasososhoth]] || [[word:lasososhoj|lasososhoj]] || [[word:lasososhosh|lasososhosh]] || [[word:lasososho|lasososho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lasoshoth|lasoshoth]] || [[word:lasoshoj|lasoshoj]] || [[word:lasoshosh|lasoshosh]] || [[word:lasosho|lasosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lasofshoth|lasofshoth]] || [[word:lasofshoj|lasofshoj]] || [[word:lasofshosh|lasofshosh]] || [[word:lasofshof|lasofshof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lasoshotho|lasoshotho]] || [[word:lasoshojo|lasoshojo]] || [[word:lasoshosho|lasoshosho]] || [[word:lasoshoko|lasoshoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lasoshoth|lasoshoth]] || [[word:lasoshoj|lasoshoj]] || [[word:lasoshosh|lasoshosh]] || [[word:lasosho|lasosho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lasoshothol|lasoshothol]] || [[word:lasoshojol|lasoshojol]] || [[word:lasoshoshol|lasoshoshol]] || [[word:lasoshokol|lasoshokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lasoshothotho|lasoshothotho]] || [[word:lasoshojojo|lasoshojojo]] || [[word:lasoshoshosho|lasoshoshosho]] || [[word:lasoshoko|lasoshoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lasoshothon|lasoshothon]] || [[word:lasoshojon|lasoshojon]] || [[word:lasoshoshon|lasoshoshon]] || [[word:lasoshokon|lasoshokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lasoshothoro|lasoshothoro]] || [[word:lasoshojoro|lasoshojoro]] || [[word:lasoshoshoro|lasoshoshoro]] || [[word:lasoshokoro|lasoshokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
